llm_instruction: This file contains only BASF jobs in China. Filter this file before loading wider Asia data. For role-specific searches, use the field JSON files when available. Copy job URLs exactly and never generate basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer, Coatings
jobs.description: About The Role We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Full Stack Developer to join our dynamic team. As a Full Stack Developer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and implementing software solutions that meet the needs of our clients. You will work with a cross-functional team to ensure the successful delivery of high-quality products How You Will Do It - Develop and maintain web applications using Angular 12+, .Net Core. - Collaborate with the team to define and implement innovative solutions for complex business requirements. - Design and implement software architecture and ensure that it aligns with the overall system architecture. - Write clean, scalable, and efficient code following best practices and coding standards. - Troubleshoot and debug software defects and issues, ensuring timely resolution. - Collaborate with UI/UX designers to ensure the implementation of visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces. - Conduct code reviews to ensure code quality and adherence to architectural guidelines. - Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry trends and apply them to enhance software development processes. - Collaborate with DevOps teams t

jobs.title: QA Automation Engineer
jobs.department: G-ECR/ODQ Global Product Quality and Operations
jobs.description: About The Role We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Automation Engineer to join our dynamic team. As an Automation Engineer, you design, develop, and maintain automated testing frameworks to ensure product quality and release stability. You collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate automation into CI/CD pipelines, validate functionality across platforms, and deliver high-quality products to customers How You Will Do It - Design, develop, and execute automated test scripts using Cypress and Postman to validate application functionality and performance - Demonstrate experience in application testing, along with current working knowledge of modern tools and testing methodologies; review, analyze, test, and communicate findings back to the development team to improve business-critical solutions - Apply strong test strategy and planning skills to develop well-defined test strategies, outline automation, and ensure overall test coverage within a digital landscape - Rely on knowledge and experience with DevOps methodology to promote a culture of automated integration and emphasize the crucial role of continuous testing. Collaborate with development teams in Agile metho

jobs.title: Intern, Application Tester
jobs.description: About The Role Within G-ECO/MD team, you will be responsible for testing our digital applications used in coatings industry. Your role involves manual testing of new features alongside the DevOps team, ensuring readiness for release. You'll facilitate both DevOps team and Product Owners by identifying, reporting, and documenting bugs and generating release notes. Your commitment to quality will drive continuous improvement, making our application a benchmark for reliability and user satisfaction in the business. How You Will Do It Conduct thorough testing of digital applications to ensure functionality, usability, and reliability. Identify, document, and report bugs and issues to the development team. Strong willingness to learn about our business processes and the underlying technology that supports them. Take initiative to acquire new skills that can contribute to the team's success. Work closely with the DevOps team and Product Owners to understand the development lifecycle and customer requirements. Provide feedback and suggestions to improve application performance and user experience. Good communication skills by effectively reporting test findings, collaborating with team me

Segment strategy • Collaborates with marketing team to build the road map of each segment of consumer electronics, new energy and automotive, also implementing the road map to contribute the business devel

jobs.title: Assistant Chemist, Alkoxylation
jobs.description: About The Role Located in BCCS lab Jinshan. Afternoon to night shift to handle the alkoxylation 5L alkox reactor, including materials treatment, reactor DCS operation, reactor cleaning and maintenance Be responsible for execution and optimization of synthesis in local and regional innovation development projects Safety and lab cleaning for responsible lab / reactor / control room area How You Will Do It Pass the certification exam of authority for alkoxylation reactor operation. Pass the internal certification exam of EM research for alkoxylation reactor operation. Need to be expertise on reactor PID, setting, DCS system and reaction system. Project Support Execute local and regional innovation synthesis projects based on alkox surfactants Route cause analysis of chemical reactions Summary of results and supporting materials Key interfaces: AT/TS and development teams G-EMH/RA and G-EMI/AT Analysis e.g. OHV / CP / color and viscosity Safety coordination Comply with regulations concerning EHS according to BCCS rules and BASF standards according to local given requirements Prepare HIRA and MOC together before lab experiments Act as safety coordinator when assigned What We Look For Ed

jobs.title: Production Operator生产操作员
jobs.description: 主要工作职责 ： - 安全环保： 严格遵守BPCH的安环保制度 及时指出任何在BPCH内违反安环保制度的行为并汇报确保负责区域环境卫生状况持续改进和提高，确保工完, 料尽,场地清正确处理突发意外事件并在***时间汇报准时参加5分钟安全教育认真进行现场交接班正确使用并维护劳防用品，防护设施和器械 - 生产： 按时完成下达的生产任务和工作量，严格按照操作规程、作业指导书准确操作，实现岗位操作规范化对本人负责的所有与反应或后反应相关的原料配制及投料和转料过程全面负责， 投料前复核原料名称及数量；巡回检查反应状况和物料状况，如有问题及时提出，并寻求解决的方法包装或放料时应做到份量准确、标签准确，整齐划一，桶外表清洁，并确保放料进度及时如实地做好操作记录认真完成相关的工艺清洗及设备的高压清洗，以及设备恢复投料前的密封和检测工作 - 质量和成本： 确保操作卡严格执行并及时准确填写确保及时取样并送分析及时如实汇报质量问题，降低不合格率以及质量有关的客户投诉。生产过程中，巡回检查控制参数合理节约成本，避免资源浪费（原料，公用工程，包装材料，辅助材料）；严格按规定排放废水和其他废弃物。主动积极提出合理化建议 - 设备： 巡回检查设备，及时提出问题并在领班/班长协助下解决检查、保养，整洁和报修所负责的设备根据设备操作程序正确使用设备在领班安排下担当维修监护/协调人,严格执行许可证制度 - 技术: 接受公司组织的各项培训熟悉本岗位各项操作规程与技术，进行一岗多能的学习；能够独立完成本岗位工作学习并拓展本生产线的生产及设备使用技术具备操作与本岗位相关的一些特种设备操作资质 - 纪律: 遵守公司的各项劳动纪律规章制度保持高出勤率，确保完成工作定额。服从 主管/领班的工作安排。在完成本职工作的前提下，主动对其他同事给予工作支持做到与同事有良好地工作关系 。 学历/资质要求: 教育背景: 大专或以上。 专业要求： 化学工程与工艺, 高分子材料与工程, 化工工艺, 应用化工技术,精细化工, 石油化工生产技术等相关专业 工作及经历要求: 化工行业1年以上工作经验。 Competency 要求: 具备相应化工生产操作的技能和知识，能独立进行聚合现场的操作。 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。

jobs.title: Manager, Communications
jobs.description: About The Role This role combines corporate communications with ownership of brand and digital communications for China. It offers a high degree of autonomy, combining strategic advisory work, hands-on execution, and effective steering of external agencies. As a communications manager in China, you will support establishing the new corporate brand in the China market and drive integrated communication activities to foster reputation and employee engagement. You will coordinate Brand and Digital Communications in China, ensuring strong alignment with global strategy while enabling effective local execution. How You Will Do It - Govern Brand and Digital Communications in China during the transition from BASF Coatings to the future standalone company. - Govern the China digital channel landscape, including strategy, editorial planning, content creation and performance optimization across relevant local platforms. - Translate global narratives and key messages into locally relevant, high-quality storytelling tailored to Chinese audiences, including the creation of engaging visual and written content. - Drive communication activities such as executive messaging, media briefings, and pre

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: About The Role Within Global Digital Factory ECO (G‑ECO/MD), you will contribute to the development of a modern web application as part of an agile DevOps team. The team builds and operates solutions that are jointly used by BASF Coatings and external customers, ensuring high quality, reliability, and continuous improvement throughout the product lifecycle. How You Will Do It - You will be delivering both Intranet and Internet applications to improve BASF Coatings services towards our customers. - Together with your team, you support the process of feature development from the first idea to the final go-live with the end-user. - You will be working in an agile and self-organized way. You not only consider development of new applications but also operations and maintenance as a valuable part of your daily work. - You collaborate closely with product owners, designers, and developers across different locations and time zones communicating asynchronously and ensuring shared understanding of requirements. - You understand, analyze, define, develop, and fulfil quality requirements for planned functionalities in close cooperation with product owners, designers and the development team. -

jobs.title: Engineer R&D -  Compounding
jobs.description: How You Will Do It Assist Lab management for routine compounding lab activities and technical support Assist lab manager to manage compounding team members to achieve target KPI and team objectives. Monitoring the compounding process at the pilot plant during development or customer sample production. No customer samples will be produced when the process is not robust (e.g., pelletizing issues, die deposit issues, raw material handling or feeding issues, etc.). Deliver process guidelines and onsite support to setup process parameters when there is new process required. Conduct process DOE and provide process guideline for a challenging product to the PD and related function based on requests. Synthesis lab report and share to stakeholders for the key take outs from the internal/ external studies. Conduct and monitor compounding process scale up and plant support Assist lab manager to verify the compounding process window prior to PTO at the plant and sharing the findings with the MTC and operation team. jobs.title: Customs Classification Specialist
jobs.description: About The Role Join our company as a key expert in customs classification of chemical products. In this role, you will ensure compliance with customs regulations and support efficient processes across Asia Pacific while being connected to a global community. How You Will Do It • Act as the primary contact for customs classification requests in the Asia Pacific region. • Perform accurate and timely customs classification for products, raw materials, and merchandise according to local and international regulations. • Monitor and analyze customs regulations in China and Asia Pacific; implement compliant processes proactively. • Support process improvements with a focus on simplification and digitalization. • Collaborate closely with Supply Chain, Sales, and Procurement teams to ensure seamless operations. • Participate in global customs classification communities and share best practices. • Additional tasks may include handling Dangerous Goods requests, packaging consulting and article release for the Asia Pacific region. What We Look For • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or a related scientific field. • Proven experience in customs classification of

jobs.description: About The Role • Serve as the legal entity lead in China, accountable for financial compliance of the entity’s statutory financial statements. • Act as the primary BASF contact with local government authorities (e.g., tax authorities) to ensure efficient, accurate and sustainable handling of tax and reporting obligations under PRC accounting and tax laws/regulations. • Build and maintain transparent, trust-based relationships with tax and other government authorities. • Serve as a proactive business partner, delivering tailored tax and finance advice and helping implement processes that support operations and the company’s long term strategy. How You Will Do It • Act as the primary contact for finance and tax service provider and local business functions to ensure efficient communication and fulfilment of internal and external reporting and filing requirements. • Work together with finance and tax service provider to ensure timely and accurate submission of group reporting packages and local statutory reports. • Collaborate with external tax service providers to manage local tax compliance, including tax filings, tax accounting and reporting, tax credit rating management and relate

jobs.title: Senior Officer, New Substance Notification
jobs.description: About The Role Our EC/ES Product Stewardship APAC unit plays a crucial role in ensuring compliance with national and international chemical legislation. As the first point of contact for Product Stewardship topics, we actively engage with stakeholders, monitor regulatory developments, and promote responsible chemical management throughout the lifecycle of our products. By sharing our knowledge and expertise, we aim to ensure that Product Stewardship is integrated into all aspects of our operations. How You Will Do It • You are together with the Chemical Regulations Manager the primary contact for ECs business units for Asian chemical regulations. In close cooperation with the EC global regulatory team, you stay up to date with the latest regulations and requirements. This helps us to ensure compliance with the legal regulations for EC operations (ECO, ECR, ECT) for finished products in APAC. • Conducting hazard assessments and risk evaluations of our products from a chemical and regulatory perspective is another important task for you. By strategically identifying emerging regulatory issues and opportunities, you assess product and marketing risks and proactively develop risk manag

jobs.description: Objectives: We are looking for a legal intern who will provide a wide range of administrative and secretarial support as well as legal support in order to effectively facilitate daily operations of China Legal team. Job Descriptions: • Track new legislations, conduct Legal research on various legal topics and draft legal memos • Translate and proof-read bilingual legal documents • Draft, review basic contracts and other legal documents • Schedule appointments, make arrangement for meetings, workshops, etc • Assist in preparing charts, meeting minutes and presentation slides and other materials for China Legal team • Collect, summarize and consolidate relevant business and legal data into reports, and establish and maintain paper filing and e-filing systems for China Legal team • Provide support with general guidance on a variety of legal projects and activities • Support other paralegal and administrative tasks assigned by Vice President, Team Leaders or Counsels in Legal Department Job Requirements: • Education: Student with legal education background, major in law preferable • Working Experience: Not required • Technical Professional Knowledge: Fluent in both oral and written Eng

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Sales (Lubricant Components China)
jobs.description: Objective • The Sales Account Manager for Lubricant Components in China is responsible for driving sales growth, managing assigned accounts, and developing new business opportunities within the lubricant components segment. This role ensures strong customer relationship, executes account strategies, leverages pricing, and collaborates with cross-functional teams to deliver value-added solutions. Main Tasks • Manage and grow assigned customer accounts, ensuring high satisfaction and profitability. • Develop and execute account plans aligned with business objectives. • Identify new opportunities in the Chinese market for lubricant components. • Promote new products and applications to expand market share. • Build strong relationships with OEMs, distributors, and key stakeholders. • Negotiate contracts and commercial terms in line with company policies. Main Requirements • Possesses at least a Bachelor's Degree in business, Chemistry, or related field. • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in sales or account management within chemical or lubricant industries. • Fluent in Mandarin and English. • Strong negotiation and sales skills with proven track record in B2B environments. • Understand

jobs.title: Chemist/Senior Chemist, Analytical Science (Spectroscopy)
jobs.description: About The Role As a chemist/senior chemist candidate in the Structural Elucidation laboratory provides technical solutions for routine and complex analytical assignments using spectroscopy techniques How You Will Do It Under supervision from lab leader/senior chemist, independently perform FTIR and NMR analysis tasks. Analyze, interpret results, and prepare technical reports. Capable of communicate with internal partners for the understanding of their analytical service requirement and result interpretation. Ability to organize tasks and set priorities to ensure timely data delivery to customer. Perform general lab assignments (e.g., chemical inventory and lab housekeeping) as assigned. jobs.title: Postdoc, Solid Process
jobs.description: About The Role You will work as an expert in process research and development, focusing on solid process and engineering . How You Will Do It Be responsible for compliance to EHS rules in your area of activity. Initiates safety review for experiments and ensures compliance to measures. Initiate, manage, constantly discuss, and align research projects with other project partners including product development, technical groups, production, universities, etc. to develop solid handling, drying, mixing, extrusion and other relevant processes. Your expertise and results will be applied to both research and operation. Provide technical support for business units in Asian Pacific region on related process development and optimization, troubleshooting, debottlenecking on field of solid characterization, conveying, drying, mixing, extrusion, etc. Design, instruct, and coach lab members for project experiments, closely watching and achieving project milestones, timeline and budget, present and document results, file patents.
